title: Too many apple's
description: a 1.19.2 fabric mod to add more apple's that do things
body:
Craft your way to new horizons with the "Too Many Apples" mod for Minecraft. This mod introduces seven unique apple types, each craftable and each with distinct effects. Experiment, create, and enjoy the enhanced possibilities these apples bring to your gameplay. Explore the biomes, gather resources, and master the art of crafting to unlock a cornucopia of effects. Elevate your Minecraft experience with the crafting revolution of "Too Many Apples."

for more apple details Try the Nebula Apple for Luck 3 and Mining Fatigue 1, or savor the XP Apple for an instant XP boost.
